utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (name, price, detailed description) -> fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (solution name and terms with LTV, fee, pre-approval timeline, schemes) -> fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (service name, costs, details) -> fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (service name, costs, details including timing) -> fully specified.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (service name, costs, details of utilities and activation) -> fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (line items and total, plus budget remaining) -> fully specified.
